name: Axonius Cybersecurity Asset Management
description: This app integrates with the Axonius Cybersecurity Asset Management Platform to enrich asset data for investigations

actions.name: Devices By Sq
actions.description: Get devices by a saved query

parameters.name: sq_name
parameters.description: The name of the Axonius saved query

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname of the Axonius asset

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Additional fields to include as part of the request (comma-separated)

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IP address of the Axonius asset

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Additional fields to include as part of the request (comma-separated)

parameters.name: mac
parameters.description: The MAC address of the Axonius asset

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Additional fields to include as part of the request (comma-separated)

parameters.description: The name of the Axonius saved query

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: mail
parameters.description: The email address of the Axonius user

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius

parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.description: Additional fields to include as part of the request (comma-separated)

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username of the Axonius user

parameters.name: max_rows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to be returned by Axonius
